summary: Hyaline membrane disease results from surfactant deficiency, causing alveolar collapse and decreased functional residual capacity (FRC). Due to impaired alveolar stability, FRC falls below the closing volume, reflecting restricted lung expansion and early alveolar closure. \boxed{A}
formatted_summary: agent2 (Round 2 summarized): Hyaline membrane disease results from surfactant deficiency, causing alveolar collapse and decreased functional residual capacity (FRC). Due to impaired alveolar stability, FRC falls below the closing volume, reflecting restricted lung expansion and early alveolar closure. \boxed{A}. Answer choice: A
